sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n14981" key="*)arhi/+fqoros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Ἀρηΐ-φθορος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n14981.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">slain in war,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">πτώματα</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0654.tlg002:21" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Corn.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">ND</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">21</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
